title: Transport
shortSummary: Use the metro, buses, taxis, and high-speed trains to get around in Mandarin.
culturalNote: China has the world's largest high-speed rail network, and the 高铁 (gāotiě) is a fast, comfortable way to travel between cities. In cities the metro (地铁) is cheap and efficient, and taxis or ride-hailing through 滴滴 (Didi) are easy if you have the app. You buy train tickets with your passport, and almost all payment is by scanning a QR code on your phone.

keyPhrases.pinyin: wǒ yào yì zhāng qù Běijīng de piào
keyPhrases.english: I want a ticket to Beijing
I want to take a taxi

grammar.rule: 坐 vs 开 for transport
grammar.explanation: Use 坐 (zuò, sit) for riding as a passenger: 坐火车 (take the train), 坐地铁 (take the metro). Use 开 (kāi) when you drive: 开车 (drive a car).

examples.en: I take the bus to work.

grammar.commonMistake: Using 开 when you are a passenger: take the bus is 坐公共汽车, not 开公共汽车.

grammar.rule: 去...的 to modify a noun
grammar.explanation: To say 'a ticket TO Beijing', Chinese puts the description before the noun with 的: 去北京的票 (a Beijing-going ticket). The 的 links the phrase to the noun.
grammar.commonMistake: Putting the destination after the noun like English. It goes before, with 的: 去北京的票.

dialogue.setup: A traveller buys a high-speed train ticket at the station counter.

lines.speaker: 旅客
lines.chinese: 你好，我要一张去上海的高铁票。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ yào yì zhāng qù Shànghǎi de gāotiě piào.
lines.english: Hello, I want a high-speed ticket to Shanghai.

lines.speaker: 售票员
lines.pinyin: Yǒu liǎng diǎn líng wǔ de, wǔbǎi kuài.

lines.speaker: 售票员
lines.pinyin: Zài jǐ hào zhàntái? Nín zài sān hào.
lines.english: Which platform? You're on number three.

quiz.question: How do you say 'take the metro'?
去北京_____票 (ticket to Beijing)
quiz.explanation: 的 links the description 去北京 to the noun 票.

quiz.question: Which verb means to drive?
quiz.explanation: 开 means to drive; 坐 is to ride as a passenger.

quiz.question: What is 高铁?
quiz.explanation: 高铁 is China's high-speed rail.

quiz.question: Arrange: 开 / 几点 / 火车
quiz.explanation: 火车 (train) + 几点 (what time) + 开 (departs).
